_doc: Two blocks: `overrides` is `(partId, optionLabel) → variantKey`, used ONLY for collapsed-label cases (an option label that sits in MORE THAN ONE Natural/Flat/Sharp column in 部材リスト.xlsx) to pick which variant base to crop for the option's static `textureUrl`. Single-variant labels are auto-derived in cut-base-variants.mjs (no entry needed). `tintBase` is `partId → { label }`: declares the option whose monotone luminance pattern is multiplied by each alternative option's icon color to generate grain-following alternative textures. See resources/reference/AUTHORING.md for details.
